# B-hybrid Phone Record Prototype Review

## Output

- PPTX: `outputs/b-hybrid-phone-record/dist/b-hybrid-phone-record.pptx`
- Preview: `outputs/b-hybrid-phone-record/preview/b-hybrid-phone-record/slide-01.png`
- Background: `outputs/b-hybrid-phone-record/assets/generated-backgrounds/phone-record-bg.png`

## Route Fit

This is a B-hybrid slide:

- The generated background carries the phone-call scene, emotional contrast, and kintone-like organized-management metaphor.
- The title, support copy, logo, page mark, and bottom rule are editable PowerPoint overlays.
- The cybozu logo is the original source-deck asset, not generated into the image.

## Visual Read

- The left side clearly shows the pain: a staff member taking phone notes under pressure.
- The right side clearly shows the intended relief: a structured record list and follow-up state.
- The yellow helper character and warm yellow accents connect this page with the previous B-hybrid test style.
- The upper-left title safe area works; copy remains readable without fighting the illustration.

## Remaining Risk

- The app dashboard inside the generated background is not editable and contains only abstract pseudo-UI.
- If a real product screen, field names, customer names, or exact process labels are needed, they should be added as separate PowerPoint overlays or handled by Route A.
